command:
echo "=== CHECK N8N DB FOR API KEYS ==="
sqlite3 /home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT * FROM user_api_keys LIMIT 10;" 2>/dev/null || echo "table not found"
sqlite3 /home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite ".tables" 2>/dev/null

echo "=== CHECK FOR API KEY IN N8N TABLES ==="
sqlite3 /home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT label, apiKey FROM user_api_keys;" 2>/dev/null || echo "no api key table"

echo "=== CHECK N8N USER TABLE ==="
sqlite3 /home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT id, email, role FROM \"user\" LIMIT 5;" 2>/dev/null || echo "no user table"

echo "=== N8N WORKFLOWS VIA SQLITE ==="
sqlite3 /home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT id, name, active FROM workflow_entity ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 20;" 2>/dev/null || echo "no workflow table"
